artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="app.log, bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="app.log, bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 124 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time app.log, bucketed into 10-minute windows ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="app.log covers 09:00-10:00 on 2026-05-11, bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Stack direction="vertical" gap="lg">
    <Text variant="body">Of the 100 lines in app.log, 22 are ERROR-level. They cluster sharply between 09:30 and 09:40, driven by a pricing upstream outage (econnrefused/etimedout) that tripped the circuit breaker and pushed 503s from the /catalog endpoint.</Text>
    <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
    <DataTable caption="ERROR count by bucket" columns='[{"key":"bucket","header":"Bucket start","type":"string"},{"key":"count","header":"ERROR lines","type":"number","align":"right"}]' rows='[{"bucket":"09:00","count":0},{"bucket":"09:10","count":1},{"bucket":"09:20","count":5},{"bucket":"09:30","count":11},{"bucket":"09:40","count":4},{"bucket":"09:50","count":1}]' />
    <Callout tone="warning" title="Peak at 09:30">The 09:30 bucket accounts for half of all ERROR lines in the window (11 of 22), coinciding with `breaker circuit_opened name=pricing failures=6 threshold=6`.</Callout>
  </Stack>
</Card>
